task_completion.description: A new track is created on the map in the vicinity of the existing Fells Loop data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new line or track path is visible on the map canvas, drawn close to or overlapping the area of the existing 'Fells Loop' track.

task_completion.description: The new track contains at least 6 track points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drawn track displays at least 6 distinct vertices, nodes, or waypoints along its path on the map or in a track properties list.

task_completion.description: The track is explicitly named 'BBS Transect 7'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layers panel, track list, or a properties/rename dialog shows the newly created track with the exact name 'BBS Transect 7'.

task_completion.description: The track is being exported or saved as a GPX file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As', 'Export', or similar dialog is open with the file type or extension explicitly set to GPX (*.gpx).

task_completion.description: The GPX file is saved to the exact required output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows the directory path 'C:\workspace\output' with the filename 'bbs_transect_7.gpx', or a file explorer/terminal window confirms the file exists at 'C:\workspace\output\bbs_transect_7.gpx'.

integrity.description: The agent used the mapping/GIS software's graphical interface to draw the track.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the use of drawing tools, cursors, or map interaction within the application, rather than a script or command-line tool generating the track.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the mapping software by manually typing the GPX file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) being used to manually write XML/GPX code to satisfy the output requirement.

integrity.description: The agent actually viewed the Fells Loop data to ensure the new track was in the correct vicinity.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map canvas is visible and loaded with the Fells Loop data while the new track is being drawn, proving the location wasn't guessed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a track with the exact name 'BBS Transect 7'. The track must have a minimum of 6 track points. The final output must be exported exactly to 'C:\workspace\output\bbs_transect_7.gpx'. The track must be drawn in the visual vicinity of the existing Fells Loop data on the map.
